HLI_FL247_420_BR420 R2 DK20_00.00.31.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 650
Recv ID: 5D0
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 415
Func Name: LEFT_HEAD_LAMP
